# EduExpress International

> Bangladesh's Evidence-First Education Consultancy.
> Better Education. Clear Costs. Written Proof.

Canonical website: https://eduexpressint.com

## What EduExpress does

EduExpress compares education quality, recognition, total cost, academic fit, visa readiness and career fit before recommending an overseas education route. Scholarship options are assessed after education fit. Admission, scholarship, visa and employment outcomes are never guaranteed.

## Verified office information

- Address: House 12/1, Ground Floor, Road 4/A, Dhanmondi, Dhaka 1209
- Phone: 0198 3333 566
- Hours: Saturday to Thursday, 11:00 AM to 6:00 PM

## Core evidence pages

- [Better Education Standard](https://eduexpressint.com/better-education-standard)
- [Fees and Transparency](https://eduexpressint.com/fees-and-transparency)
- [How Universities Are Verified](https://eduexpressint.com/how-we-verify-universities)
- [Student Data Privacy](https://eduexpressint.com/student-data-privacy)
- [Complaints and Resolution](https://eduexpressint.com/complaints-and-resolution)
- [Country Service Status](https://eduexpressint.com/country-status)

## China flagship service

- [Study in China from Bangladesh](https://eduexpressint.com/study-in-china-from-bangladesh)
- [China Visa-First Policy](https://eduexpressint.com/china-visa-first-policy)

China service wording: "No file opening charge. No EduExpress service fee before China visa approval. Any university, embassy, medical, translation, courier, deposit or other third-party fee required earlier must be itemized in writing before the student proceeds."

This file is a discovery aid, not a claim that llms.txt affects rankings. Time-sensitive education and visa facts should be checked against the official sources and verification dates shown on the relevant page.
